title: BAD-AGENT DEMO: agent talks straight over a real interruption (FAIL: should yield, did not)

transcript.agent: So the total comes to two hundred and forty dollars and that includes the delivery fee and the setup and the extended warranty which I would really recommend because...
transcript.caller: stop, I did not agree to the warranty, take it off

why_it_matters: DELIBERATE BAD-AGENT RENDER. The caller clearly takes the floor and keeps it for over two seconds, but the agent never stops: did_yield is false, so this should-yield event FAILS. This is the missed-real-interruption axis of the funnel. Paired with fd-02 (a false barge-in on a backchannel), it proves no single sensitivity threshold can satisfy both at once.
